message:
test(core): add property-based tests for tiered scrollback (ft-2p9cb.3.3.3)

11 proptests: conservation, migration conservation, hot util bounded,
tier rank monotonic, ingest monotonic, evict pane precise, reset zeroes,
tier/event/degradation/snapshot serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
